message: 🌱 Add dify: After upgrading to Dify 1.4.0, the WebScraper tool cannot mission (#732)

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "dify-19778-after-upgrading-to-dify-1-4-0-the-webscraper-tool-cannot-be-worked",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dify: After upgrading to Dify 1.4.0, the WebScraper tool cannot be worked.",
+    "description": "After upgrading to Dify 1.4.0, the WebScraper tool cannot be worked.. This issue affects 11+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify dify troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your dify deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify -n dify --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review dify configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant dify configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify\nkubectl get configmap -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dify\n```\n### Self Checks\n\n### Dify version\n\n1.4.0\n\n### Cloud or Self Hosted\n\nCloud\n\n### Steps to reproduce\n\nAfter upgrading to Dify 1.40, when creating a new workflow and using the webscraper tool, this node displays the error message: \"Failed to transform"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for After upgrading to Dify 1.4.0, the WebScraper tool cannot",
+        "description": "# Summary\n\nReplaces custom readability parsing logic with the readabilipy library for improved performance and simplicity.\n\nAddresses improved maintainability and performance.\r\r\n\n# Screenshots\n\n| Before | After |\n|--------|-------|\n| ...    | ...   |\n> [!IMPORTANT]  \n> Please review the checklist below before submitting your pull request.\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm After upgrading to Dify 1.4.0, the WebScraper is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify -n dify --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n dify --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "# Summary\n\nReplaces custom readability parsing logic with the readabilipy library for improved performance and simplicity.\n\nAddresses improved maintainability and performance.\r\r\n\n# Screenshots\n\n| Before | After |\n|--------|-------|\n| ...    | ...   |\n> [!IMPORTANT]  \n> Please review the checklist below before submitting your pull request.",

+    }
